title: Header Fields, Media Types, Negotiation, JSON, and Runtime Validation · Automation and Data Client Syst… · Language Clinic: Field Semantics
summary: A dataset harvester negotiates JSON and CSV, receives mislabeled UTF-8, and must validate records before adding them to analysis tables. Planned artifact: Add and verify the http py field semantics increment in a Python 3.14 urllib and HTTP client layers representation negotiation and validation boundary. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Handle field names, repeated lines, combination rules, whitespace, size, and hop-by-hop boundaries by specification. Demonstrate the result through Python 3.14 urllib, http.client, ssl, typed protocols, and fixture transports.

Apply If-Match, If-None-Match, and related preconditions to prevent lost updates and duplicate effects. Demonstrate the result through Python 3.14 urllib, http.client, ssl, typed protocols, and fixture transports.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""http-clients-python cumulative safe data-client portfolio.

Browser labs use deterministic request and response models only. Live urllib,
DNS, TLS, sockets, concurrency, and load require local Python 3.14 transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RequestEvidence:
    method: str
    target: str
    attempt: int

@dataclass(frozen=True)
class ResponseEvidence:
    status: int
    body_bytes: int
    valid: bool

print("Python HTTP client portfolio ready")
